evals.name: client-pitch-sanoma
evals.prompt: Draft a 7-slide client pitch deck for Sanoma from Mearra. The pitch is about our Mearra Method (Idea → Vision → Implement) and one concrete concept case study: a live-listening AI assistant that turns sales meetings into media plans. Presenters: Maija Helminen & Vesa Palmu, date 20.4.2026. Save it as sanoma-pitch.pptx.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file with a cover slide in Mearra brand (Indigo background, italic condensed heading, tagline, logo), a section divider, a 3-column Mearra Method slide, a concept case-study slide, a why-it-works 2-col slide, and a closing Thank you! / mearra.com slide. All slides in Mearra colors; headlines in Mearra voice.

evals.name: steering-group-update
evals.prompt: Make a 6-slide steering-group update deck for the 'Project Luotsi' engagement at our client HUS. Context: we're in Phase 2 of 3. Last 6 weeks: shipped the MCP integration and the proposal-assistant beta. Open risks: data residency review still pending, one senior engineer leaving end of Q2. Decision requested today: continue Phase 3 as scoped (yes/no). Save as hus-steering-group.pptx.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file with a cover slide, a 'Where we are' status slide, a 2-column 'Wins / Open risks' slide, a big-number or metric slide if helpful, a 'Decision required' slide, and a closing slide with mearra.com. Voice is Mearra: confident, active, direct. No generic consultancy language.

evals.name: internal-all-hands
evals.prompt: Create a 4-slide internal Mearra all-hands deck celebrating Q1 2026 wins. Three big wins to highlight: (1) Shipping the Mearra Method to 5 new clients, (2) Winning the Sanoma concept engagement, (3) Hiring 8 new experts. Tone: warm, quirky, proud-not-cocky. Save as mearra-q1-allhands.pptx.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx with cover, section header or title-only slide, a 3-column wins slide, and a closing. All Mearra-branded. Internal voice — warmer and more quirky than client decks, but still Mearra.
